use_cases: User registration and account creation in web applications
Switching between signup and login modes within a single dialog
Password visibility toggle for improved UX during authentication
Collecting user credentials (email, password, name) in a modal context
ai_summary: A React authentication dialog component that provides signup and login functionality within a modal overlay. Built with Radix UI primitives, it features a mode toggle between signup and login forms, password visibility toggle, and responsive design with rounded corners and centered content. The component uses standard form inputs with labels and includes proper accessibility attributes through the useId hook.
